name: 1Password Secrets Automation
description: 1Password Secrets Automation — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool for developers. Specializes in Secrets Management.

seo.title: 1Password Secrets Automation Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete 1Password Secrets Automation analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec.

review.verdict: Best for vulnerability scanning in ci/cd. 1Password Secrets Automation offers custom pricing.
pros: Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security
cons: False positives require developer triage time

lock_in.reason: Secrets can be exported but deep integration creates switching cost

transparency.reason: Public pricing on business tiers; clear model

developer_experience.reason: CLI, multiple SDKs, GitHub Actions integrations, decent docs
